'''Nar Shaddaa Shipping''' was a shipping corporation based on the [[Dravian Starport]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Nar Shaddaa Shipping were looking to contract independent [[free-trader]]s to deliver fifty [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] circuit boards to the manufacturing [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ather]]. The payment for the work was 3,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Tales of the Smoking Blaster|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook|stext=Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster''}} {{1stm}}
